entry.title: how to implement authentication of rest API
entry.content:
カスタマイズAPIで、Basic認証で実装したいと考えております。


他システムとのデータ連携のために、APIを利用しています。
※ occ apiではなく、新規でカスタマイズで作成したREST APIです。
    このREST APIはCommerce Cloudに実装していて、他のシステムがREST APIを実行してデータを連携します


このAPIではBasic認証でユーザー(権限)の確認をしたいと考えております。


Basic認証の実装方法が分からなかったため、実装方法を教えて頂きたいです。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: how to implement authentication of rest API
entry.content: https://me.sap.com/notes/0003050787

entry.title: Re: Need help! How to set ETag for a PATCH request with O...
entry.content:
Hi Jerry,

Thanks a lot for your reply.

I actually found the solution, it was not about the value of the ETag, but the root cause lie inside the Model Class of the Service Consumption Model.

When I downloaded the OData EDMX file from SAP Business Accelerator Hub and imported it into Eclipse ADT to create Service Consumption Model, there was nothing inside EDMX file related to ETag. Even though there is a field called "LastChangedDateTime" which is intentionally reserved to be used as ETag, but it is not defined explicitly in the EDMX file. As a result, the generated model could not deal with ETag when I was trying to pass it to the API.

Way to solve this, if the EDMX file does not contain any information for ETag handling, I go to Model Class of the Service Consumption Model, add new field to the Entity Structure (in my case is the entity "A_CHANGE_MASTER") with the STRING data type.

    TYPES:
      "! <p class="shorttext synchronized">A_ChangeMasterType</p>
      BEGIN OF tys_a_change_master_type,
*  Other fields go here
*  ...
        "! ETag
        etag TYPE string,
      END OF tys_a_change_master_type,

Then in the defining method, we simply set this new field to be used as ETag.

    lo_primitive_property = lo_entity_type->get_primitive_property( 'ETAG' ).
    lo_primitive_property->set_edm_name( 'ETag' ) ##NO_TEXT.
    lo_primitive_property->set_edm_type( 'String' ) ##NO_TEXT.
    lo_primitive_property->set_max_length( 256 ) ##NUMBER_OK.
    lo_primitive_property->set_is_technical( ).
    lo_primitive_property->use_as_etag( ).

We can achieve the same with the existing field "LastChangedDateTime", just change the data type to STRING and also set it to be used as ETag in the defining method and it can work fine.

Thanks again!

entry.title: Re: SAP client connect server failed.(security certificate)
entry.content: Hi, did you able to solve this issue? Browsing around but seems there is no solution for this.

entry.title: SAC and Maintenance Events
entry.content:
Hi all, 

I'm very new to SAP so please excuse me if i've posted this in the wrong area or I use the wrong terminology (my background is SQL and .Net amongst other things).

My company needs me to look into creating a series of dashboards for them using SAC.  The problem I keep facing is locating the pieces of data I require to present on the dashboard.  Two specific examples are:

1. I need to be able to show Maintenance Orders and their Maintenance Event assignment (from Planning Buckets) - we want to ensure compliance.  While I can retrieve the maintenance order and operation details just fine, I have not been able to locate a data source that will give me the Event they have been allocated to.  In the "Find Maintenance Orders and Operations" app that information is readily available.

2. I need to be able to show which Maintenance Orders belong to which Planner Group.  Now while I can get hold of the Planner Group code, I actually want the Planner Group name.  I can't for the life of me identify where I can retrieve this information!

Might anybody be able to point me in the right direction?  I'm going around in circles and it is very trial and error.

We are using the S4 HANA Public Cloud edition.

entry.title: How to setup exchange rate type in BP(Customer)
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

I created outgoing invoices processed in foreign currency (HKD) and the system displayed the exchange rate from the exchange rate type "M."

I need the system default exchange rate type to "YTH" when I record AR transactions.

Please suggest.

Best regards,

May

entry.title: 🎉 Exciting News: I’m SAP Certified! 🎉
entry.content:
I’m excited to share that I’ve officially earned my SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition certification! This achievement marks the start of an exciting journey, and I’m looking forward to exploring all the opportunities it brings.

During my time in the Vower Bootcamp, I gained valuable hands-on experience with the SAP Live System, developing skills in system configuration, business process integration, and data migration. The program has equipped me with the tools I need to thrive in the SAP ecosystem, and I’m particularly interested in how SAP solutions drive efficiency and innovation in industries like supply chain and manufacturing. Currently, I’m participating in Vower’s Job Placement Program and can’t wait to kickstart my career in this dynamic field.

A huge thank you to @David_Chaviano or your guidance and support—it’s been instrumental in helping me achieve this milestone. I’m truly grateful for your mentorship! 🙌

Fun fact: I love experimenting with skincare and have a knack for understanding which products work best for different skin types.

Let’s connect and explore opportunities to collaborate. I’m eager to grow, learn, and contribute to the SAP community!

entry.title: Maintain multiple credit limit in single credit segment
entry.content:
Hi, 

I am new to the SAP Credit Management (FIN-FSCM-CR). 

May I know is it possible to set multiple credit limit in single credit segment? I saw one person answer in below post "We can maintain multiple credit limit against credit segment", but I could not find any guide or steps on how to maintain this in BP (UKM000) transaction.

Can someone share the steps to maintain this if possible? Thank you.

 https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/s4-hana-fscm-multiple-credit-limit-for-multiple-credit-segment-per-bp/qaq-p/12137122 

Regards

Zaida

entry.title: Re: How often to update HANA Cockpit?
entry.content: Agree with Prithviraj answer...

entry.title: Re: How often to update HANA Cockpit?
entry.content:
Hello Christopher,

There is no correct or general answer for this from SAP. We regularly update our HANA cockpit to use latest feature but you can consider updating it based on maintenance strategy and according to required feature. SAP released new SAP note which mentioned new feature according to Cockpit version. Please have a look > https://me.sap.com/notes/3544955

entry.title: Re: What is "Date for Free Use" in Batch Management
entry.content:
Hello @SI_y_Ito 

SAP has provided six free date fields in the batch master data for flexible usage, allowing businesses to tailor them to their specific needs.

For instance, in the pharmaceutical industry, these fields can be used to track important dates such as batch stability testing, regulatory audit schedules, or the planned destruction date for unused or unsold batches.

Best Regards

Vivek Savant

entry.title: Inspection Lot XXXX for order XXXX does not have necessary status
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

As per the month end activity we are trying to close the process order for material. While closing one of the orders, we are getting an error as 'Inspection Lot XXXX for order XXXX does not have necessary status', but as per checking we found that the inspection lot is set properly with UD and ICCO status, still the system is not allowing to close the order. Can you pls let me know what is causing to show up this error and what should be the action to resolve this issue. I have attached the snap of inspection lot status.

entry.title: Re: Installing Composable Storefront for SAP Commerce 2211.20
entry.content: HI @PierreB  i have followed the steps correctly. About spartacus version it takes 4.3.8 as default even if I give 2211.29.1 in package.json file and while adding the spartacus package.It seesm version issue of spartacus how do i isntall 2211.29 since am using 2211.29 hybris version..

entry.title: Re: SAP Build App deployment
entry.content:
An Application built with Build Apps is only an HTML5 application; there is no Cloud Foundry app. You can find it under HTML5 Applications in the subaccount. There is nothing to start in Cloud Foundry.  Cloud Foundry is only used as infrastructure to deploy this app, packaged in an mtar, into HTML5 Repository. 

You can also find this application listed in Site Manager (Build Work Zone Site Builder) under Content Explorer/HTML5 Apps.

entry.title: Detect MRP situation app, I cant add new exception scenario apart from CAN and EXC.
entry.content:
While getting the report from the Batch Job run through app - Detect MRP Situations, I cannot add new exception messages apart from CAN ( Cancel process) and EXC (Excess stock).

I looked at creating custom situation handling, but there is no available situation type or situation object related to MRP situations.

Can anyone help to understand if it is possible to create custom handling situation for additional exception messages apart from the standard one SAP provides?

entry.title: Re: HTTP calls to SAP Cloud Integration from API Manageme...
entry.content:
<BasicAuthentication async='false' continueOnError='false' enabled='true' xmlns='http://www.sap.com/apimgmt'>

async was true which resulted in a scenario was API management didnt wait to fetch the password which in turn was pending on key value map lookup. This resulted in generation of a Authorization header like below

Authorization: Basic <base64 Encoded Username>:

password was missing hence SAP CI rejected this in the http level, should have given 401 at least but gave 500 which is misleading. 

anyways log message helped as i could see the authorization header by logging everything.

Changing async to false in BasicAuth policy resolved the issue , Also I removed 10-12 useless headers from the request that API management inserted.

entry.title: Re: How to get excact Budget planning value without excha...
entry.content: The company code assigned to the WBS element will define the Object Currency.  Then when you enter the budget make sure you are entering the values in object currency.  The object currency will automatically be converted to CO Area Currency and saved, but the entered values in the object currency are the "base" values.

entry.title: Re: Am not able to modify loginDisabled attribute for my...
entry.content:
Hi @Indumati_Patil 

What specific issues or errors are you facing? If the Impex script failed in HAC, it should guide you how to resolve the issue/error. 

I tried it on my end, and OOTB it worked fine, unless you implemented some logics like interceptors around the field. 

insert_update Customer;uid[unique=true];loginDisabled[allownull=true];
;zohan@customer.com;true;

Also, may be you can check by running the P/L for the specific period range of the JE to confirm, if the difference value relates to the entry identified or it is some other. Check the JE itself whether values appear properly in the rows. Kr, Jitin

entry.title: Re: Local approuter gives cors error while using a deployed service
entry.content: @gregorw My UI is calling the approuter URL which is supposed to call the actual destination.

entry.title: Re: Local approuter gives cors error while using a deployed service
entry.content: @Dinu. Yes the last picture is from browser. the UI is trying to call the metadata of the destination via approuter url. Which gives CORS error, but when the same link is being used directly on browser it works.

entry.title: Re: Application Jobs in On-Premise systems - part1
entry.content: SAP Note 3296779 - Display-only role for application jobs is only valid and relevant for Public Cloud Products, actually it's not suitable for this article.

entry.title: Re: Local approuter gives cors error while using a deployed service
entry.content: CORS errors occur when the app in the browser embeds URLs from other domains. So it is not surprising that the URL ($metadata) does not fail when accessed directly. Is this prefix of this URL ($metadata) same that of the application that fails?

entry.title: SUM Roadmap Error
entry.content:
We are trying to upgrade from S/4HANA 2020 to S/4HANA 2023 and we have completed the SUM Preprocessing phase. However the SUM tool is giving an odd message, "The Roadmap step Preprocessing completed successfully. You can continue with Roadmap step Reset". 

Has anyone experienced this issue? If you can provide some guidance on how to diagnose this, that too will be useful. If pre-processing is successful then the next step should be Execution and not Reset.

entry.title: Re: Local approuter gives cors error while using a deployed service
entry.content: @Dinu The url which gives the error is localhost:5000/{serviceRoute} the one that calls is localhost:4004

entry.content:

We are newly installing FRUN system. When loading FRUN FLP for the first time, I could not find any of the apps available. 

Could you please let me know what configuration step could be missing. I tried following most of the SAP blogs but could not get into the issue.

FYI, I am following FRUN_Masterguide_403.pdf  for FRUN configuration.

One of the note I found to be related 3368272 - Fiori Launchpad shows no tiles when accessed using protocol HTTP or using protocol HTTPS through SAP Web Dispatcher - SAP for Me,
But I am already using standard logon procedure.

Regards,

Priyanshu

entry.title: Re: Local approuter gives cors error while using a deploy...
entry.content:
This is the issue:

"The url which gives the error is localhost:5000/{serviceRoute} the one that calls is localhost:4004"

Change your UI application to only make requests the same origin as it is served from. Let approuter which serves it route the requests to the correct url/destination.

entry.title: Re: SAC - how to trigger my input parameter to run the mo...
entry.content:
Probably you can try to use setVariableValue API to achieve this. 

https://help.sap.com/doc/1639cb9ccaa54b2592224df577abe822/release/en-US/index.html#DataSource_MsetVariableValue

entry.title: Re: Local approuter gives cors error while using a deploy...
entry.content:
when I try to make request to port 4004 where the main application is running the service request give 404. in approuter I am calling the correct destination which is a deployed service on BTP

"autoService": {
"uri": "http://localhost:5000/v2/odata/v4/automation/",
"type": "OData",
"settings": {
"annotations": [],
"odataVersion": "2.0"
}
}
this is what datasource looks like in manifest

entry.title: In the Activate Exam they ask what is need to estimate the backlog. What is the answer
entry.content: I have searched in all learning material and cannot find the answer

entry.title: Re: How to use lock objects in Developer Extensibility
entry.content:
This does not mean that an error has occurred. If the processing is going well, executing line 78 should not update the data in the target range, but it does. I confirmed this on the Preview screen of the Fiori created with RAP.

Are you referring to the settings of the lock object? I have attached that below. Please let me know again if this is not what you intended.

entry.title: Re: Local approuter gives cors error while using a deploy...
entry.content: You should not add hostname in the uri property of data source. Typical CAP (development) server setup only allows for requests to one (the same) CAP application. If you want to connect to two CAP application you need to access the application using a reverse proxy that will route the requests correctly; either use approuter or use backend proxy in Fiori/UI5 tools.

entry.title: Re: Create Subscription Quote Based On a Specific Configu...
entry.content:
Hi,

With introduction of multi-level AVC with BOM feature in S/4HANA 2023 FPS0, configuration date can be assigned/ updated in the subscription item while creating the subscription order as well as solution quotation. Help documentation provides useful information on the same Multi-Level Configuration of Product Bundles Using Advanced Variant Configuration | SAP Help Portal

In 2023 FPS1 and FPS2, multi-level AVC with BOM are also supported via API and in master agreement. Subscription order: API_SUBSCRIPTIONORDER
Solution Quotation: API_BUS_SOLUTION_QUOTATION_SRV

Regards
Deepak

entry.title: Re: Clear Facts & Classic Story BUG
entry.content: Is it a planning model or analytics model?

entry.title: Re: Local approuter gives cors error while using a deployed service
entry.content: @Dino the localhost:5000 is the url to the local approuter. which I am using to redirect to the deployed link of the CAP service. Even after using approuter I am getting the CORS issue

entry.title: Re: EHS Duplicate Resource Error in Identify Risk app
entry.content:
Dear Ali,

it seems that something went wrong with the risk identification in the first place. In general, the combination of the following attributes must be unique (and is enforced by the system to be unique):

  • Location,
  • Operational Status,
  • Hazard,
  • Job,
  • Chemical (if applicable),
  • Method of Use (if applicable).

Therefore, the identified risk Corrosion (Diethylaluminum Chloride, Welding) violates the above constraint. Normally, it should not have been possible to identify the same risk twice - on the second try, an error message should have been shown.

"Risk with hazard Corrosion already exists"

I'd run the following checks to see what went wrong or to identify the root cause of the issue:

  1. Check if the duplicate is also a duplicate on the database. Please open transaction SE16N, and have a look at the table EHHSSD_RSK_ROOT - put in the filters to search for the Chemical, Method of Use, and Hazard. If this is an actual duplicate - try to reproduce the issue on any other location/job. An error message should show. If this is not a duplicate on a database level - check if there are any enhancements/modifications to the gateway service.
  2. Try to assign the risks to a risk assessment project. From the risk assessment project, you can delete/void one of the identified risks.

With kind regards,

Michael

entry.title: Version Management in PR created from CJ20N Project services
entry.content: I have a doubt in version management. I have a customer, who is creating PR from CJ20N project builder, and the version management is active for the PR, where they want the short text field to be mandatory. AS they are creating THE PR from projects, here there is no field to add the version short text so it is not allowing them to save the PR from CJ20N. Is there any workaround possible other than making the version short text field as a optional entry. Kindly them me with this query.

entry.title: Re: Am not able to modify loginDisabled attribute for my...
entry.content:
Resolved:
I was missing modifier [allownull=true] It worked

entry.title: Re: How to use lock objects in Developer Extensibility
entry.content: you'd better state your requirement/scenario, and what you expect? are you calling that api to lock object in your action handler and expect the object to be locked and expect to release the lock by calling another action later?

entry.title: Re: How to update data in custom facet with the use of da...
entry.content:
Hi Dhaval,

I depends upon how have you created the fields in tha facet. If the fields created are via KUT adaptation/ SDK extension, you need to extend these fields to odata and use standard data workbench to update these fields.

Thanks,

Jayant S

entry.title: Re: SUM Roadmap Error
entry.content:
Hi DKappu,

Check the Preprocessing phase log, and follow the link in the preprocessing steps if any error message share the log.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SLTOOLSET/5399538756114983bbd2cc7a74f1d430/d897fbcc931c447081a486bfd769a05c.html

Regards

SS

entry.title: How To change the eMAil ID of S-user?
entry.content:
Current S-user E-mail address is old and need to change to a new one.

Please advise how we can manage this in future on its own. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How To change the eMAil ID of S-user?
entry.content:
Dear customer,

Kindly know S-users can no longer manage their own email addresses in SAP for Me, only the administrators can. Also, administrators cannot change their own email addresses either, so another administrator must do this for them.

Product support engineer can not change email for S-user when there are active administrators.

So please kindly contact your company's Super Administrators, User Administrators, or Cloud Administrators (listed here) to change your S-user ID email address for them in the User Management application.

If the affected S-user is linked to SAP Universal ID, the user must first add the new email address to their UID in the SAP Universal ID Account Manager by following the steps in KBA 2882908.

Please refer to KBA 3108466 - How to update the email address for S-user IDs - SAP for Me.

Thanks and regards,
Joanna

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to create a CRUD SAP Fiori Elements ap...

entry.title: Re: Updating PurchaseDownPayments with a service layer er...
entry.content:
Hi ANKIT_CHAUHAN

You mean I shouldn't pass this value?

entry.title: Re: SDK Code in Hana
entry.content:
Hi ramco1917,

It can be done something as below:

 

Query = @"SELECT IFNULL(SUM(""U_PKGWGHT"") + SUM(""U_BAGWGHT""), 0) AS ""BAGWGHT"" FROM " + TEST.HanaDBName + @".""@PACKINGTABLE"" WHERE ""U_BAGNUM"" = '" + MYBAGNUM + "'";
SAPbobsCOM.Recordset oRs = ((SAPbobsCOM.Recordset)(oCompany.GetBusinessObject(SAPbobsCOM.BoObjectTypes.BoRecordset)));
oRs.DoQuery(Query);

 

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Apps not available in FRUN launchpad
entry.content: *FRN* roles were added and apps are visible now.

Best regards,

Mio

entry.title: How to configure event for Metric "Number of Users" in Health Monitoring
entry.content:
Which event can be chosen for raising an alert for metric "Number of Users" in Health Monitoring in Cloud ALM?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to configure event for Metric "Number of Users" i...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

SAP Cloud ALM for Operations separates the metric issue response flow into three parts : 

- The metric data collection.
- The metric value comparison to the threshold values.
- The events to generate alerts/e-mails in response to the metric value passing a threshold.

There is not always a 1 to 1 match between a metric and an event.
Some metrics are "bundled" into a shared pre-built event category.
And other metrics do not yet have a pre-built event category available for them. 

There is a mapping between metrics and events, however this mapping is not one-to-one.
And not every metric corresponds an event.

For Metric "Number of Users", there is a metric, but no associated event to raise an alert. Only a red rating would be possible in case a certain threshold is exceeded.

Best regards,
Ellie
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: SAP Build App deployment
entry.content:

However, how can I disable authentication?

I did it in App Editor, however, it is still showing.

entry.title: Re: Create Subscription Quote Based On a Specific Configu...
entry.content: Hi Deepak, thanks for sharing your comments and the helpful information. In the above scenario the product configuration is a single level with BOM explosion marked as None. The subscription items are exploded via product bundle.

entry.title: HTTP Call working in ECC but not working in S4
entry.content: I have a report program where I am making an HTTP call using the CL_HTTP_CLIENT class. The same report is present in ECC and S4 without any difference between them. The HTTP Call is working in ECC but giving hostname unknown error in S4. The functional spec for the report mentions installation of some certificate by basis team but I am not sure if it required for the HTTP Call. Can anyone please help me with it. Please let me know if any more info is required. Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: How to map hospital equipments in SAP EAM?
entry.content:
This depends on how you might model the 'owner' / 'utilizer' to which the cost would ave to be assigned.

Are you using goods movements to move the equis around?

entry.title: Re: How to use lock objects in Developer Extensibility
entry.content:
I will explain the original requirements I want to achieve in more detail.

I want to develop a program that registers certain business data using the BORAP façade. In doing so, I plan to store the interfaced data of the original data to be registered in a custom table. After the business data registration is complete, I want to add the registration result information of the business data to the custom table.

At this time, I wanted to execute the commit for the registration/update of the business data and the custom table at the same time to prevent one from being incomplete. I have confirmed that the EML specifications allow for simultaneous commit, and that the RAP mechanism automatically locks while MODIFY ENTITIES~ is running.

However, I decided that simultaneous commit would be difficult for the following reasons. This is because I confirmed that the most typical registration results returned to the REPORTED parameter are returned at the time of commit (COMMIT ENTITIES), not when MODIFY ENTITIES~ is processed. I wanted to update the custom table according to the registration result of the business data, so I decided that simultaneous commit was not possible with this requirement.

Therefore, as an alternative solution to prevent a situation where only one of the two processes fails, we came up with the following processing order and investigated a method of explicitly initiating the lock process.

1. Lock the custom table using a lock object

2. MODIFY ENTITIES business data

3. COMMIT ENTITIES business data

4. Obtain and edit the processing results

5. MODIFY ENTITIES custom table

6. COMMIT ENTITIES custom table

7. Unlock the custom table

entry.title: Re: Max Value highlight with Cross Calculation and Calcul...

entry.title: Re: How to setup exchange rate type in BP(Customer)
entry.content: Hi May, To change the exchange rate type, your configuration expert can define your own exchange rate types in the Check Exchange Rate Types configuration activity. https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0fa84c9d9c634132b7c4abb9ffdd8f06/dad9824c10514a54b2f2ac8e7e855442.html?state=DRAFT&version=2408.VAL Best Regards, Alice

ANKIT CHAUHAN

entry.title: Maintenance Plan with Scheduling Indicator "Time-Key date" not getting scheduled in IP30H
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am facing an issue while scheduling of maintenance plans with IP30H.

Maintenance plans are not getting scheduled.

Maintenance plans having scheduling indicator is " Time-Key date".

Please help me out to get these maintenance plans scheduled with IP30H.

entry.title: Re: SAP QM - Result recording - Status
entry.content:
Greetings,

I have never heard of status influencing sample size so I tried to replicate your scenario. If I try to record results in QA02 or QE51N transaction, system offers only 8 slots for results recording.

The following message is displayed by SAP.

Try to use  use transaction QE73 - results recording for master inspection characteristic. SAP offers 10 slots for results recording as proposed by sampling procedure.

Best regards, M.

entry.title: Re: Create Subscription Quote Based On a Specific Configu...
entry.content: Deepak, I'll use to test the scenario as suggested and share the results but if I correctly understand the usage of configuration date, the BOM - Bill of Materials are exploded based on the passed date to the configuration date. As an example: Char A with value A1 has a material CA1 effective from 1/1/2024 and change in material CA1_01 effective from 1/1/2025 then based on the configuration date the material to be exploded between CA1 vs CA1_01 is determined, that's my understanding. In the requested scenario we want to influence the product configuration itself based on the simulation date. The subscription order to be created based on the production configuration that is active on the specified date rather than the current system date.

entry.title: Re: Updating PurchaseDownPayments with a service layer error: "Unallowed item cost [DPO1.INMPri
entry.content:
I reproduced this problem in SBODEMOCN

1、POTS https://{{IP}}:50000/b1s/v1/PurchaseDownPayments

 

{
    "DocDate": "2024-12-24",
    "TaxDate": "2024-12-24",
    "DocDueDate": "2024-12-24",
    "PriceMode": "pmdGross",
    "DownPaymentType": "dptRequest",
    "CardCode": "V10000",
    "DocTotal": 441.6,
    "DocumentLines": [
        {
            "InventoryQuantity": 1,
            "TaxTotal": 28.99,
            "ItemCode": "A00001",
            "VatGroup": "J1",
            "LineNum": 0,
            "BaseType": -1,
            "Price": 11.150442,
            "PriceAfterVAT": 12.6,
            "LineTotal": 223.01,
            "GrossTotal": 252,
            "UnitsOfMeasurment": 1
        },
        {
            "InventoryQuantity": 1,
            "TaxTotal": 34.51,
            "ItemCode": "A00002",
            "VatGroup": "J2",
            "LineNum": 1,
            "BaseType": -1,
            "Price": 8.849558,
            "PriceAfterVAT": 10.0,
            "LineTotal": 265.49,
            "GrossTotal": 300,
            "UnitsOfMeasurment": 1
        }
    ]
}

 

2、PATCH https://{{IP}}:50000/b1s/v1/PurchaseDownPayments(DocEntry)

 

{
    "DocDate": "2024-12-24",
    "TaxDate": "2024-12-24",
    "DocDueDate": "2024-12-24",
    "PriceMode": "pmdGross",
    "DownPaymentType": "dptRequest",
    "CardCode": "V10000",
    "DocTotal": 552.0,
    "DocumentLines": [
        {
            "InventoryQuantity": 1,
            "TaxTotal": 28.99,
            "ItemCode": "A00001",
            "VatGroup": "J1",
            "LineNum": 0,
            "BaseType": -1,
            "Price": 11.150442,
            "PriceAfterVAT": 12.6,
            "LineTotal": 223.01,
            "GrossTotal": 252,
            "UnitsOfMeasurment": 1
        },
        {
            "InventoryQuantity": 1,
            "TaxTotal": 34.51,
            "ItemCode": "A00002",
            "VatGroup": "J2",
            "LineNum": 1,
            "BaseType": -1,
            "Price": 8.849558,
            "PriceAfterVAT": 10.0,
            "LineTotal": 265.49,
            "GrossTotal": 300,
            "UnitsOfMeasurment": 1
        }
    ]
}

entry.title: Re: AI in 2025 - predictions or guessing game
entry.content:
Great article. In addition, I would like to bet on:
1. Small Language Model(SLM): Small and specialized LMs will take the spaces of vertical industries, and the long tails etc., while the LLM remains dominant for general-purpose. And these SLMs should also be adapted with custom data by fine-tuning.

2. More cost-efficience of LLMs training: Cost efficiency of LLM training is a major concern of LLM vendors. DeepSeek V3 has reduced the training of computing capacity by 10 times as LLaMa 3 with comparable performance as a Xmas gift, which we will expect to see more competition on this trend of training efficiency.

3. Awareness of Data Sovereignty: Expect more act on Data Sovereignty on national level.

entry.content: Same operation I can update on the client side.

entry.title: Enable Now - User Report
entry.content:
Hello everyone, I would like to know if there is a way to know which active user belongs to which workspace?

For context, my team manages multiple workspaces, we are trying to find out users that are active but not engaging with the contents. I have managed to extract the list of non-engaging active users, but unable to identify which of the workspace these users belong to.

entry.title: Re: BAPI to create handling units in SAP EWM?
entry.content:
Hello @scottcarricknwn 

To my knowledge BAPI_HU_CREATE creates ERP HUs, not EWM ones. It is easy to mix them up when you have embedded EWM deployment. 

EWM HUs can be managed with the /SCWM/CL_WM_PACKING class.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: EHS Duplicate Resource Error in Identify Risk app
entry.content: Hi Michael
